disease_info.Bacteria: Bacterial leaf symptoms can appear as water-soaked or dark necrotic spots.
disease_info.Fungi: Fungal infection often presents as expanding lesions with irregular boundaries.
disease_info.Healthy: Leaf surface appears visually normal with no major disease symptoms.
disease_info.Nematode: Nematode stress may appear through chlorosis, deformation, or weak tissue areas.
disease_info.Pest: Pest damage can include chewing marks, punctures, or local tissue destruction.
disease_info.Phytopthora: Phytophthora symptoms often include dark blight lesions and rapid tissue collapse.
disease_info.Virus: Virus infection may produce mottling, mosaic patterns, curling, or stunted growth.
